The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
The Paraphrase Strategy
Every 5th-­‐7th slide, you want to break your
pa9ern from using every word you are saying on screen
to using only a paraphrased version of the material
on that slide.
Example:
“This Helps You Lose Weight…”
“Really Speeds Things Up!”

The Headline Benefit Formula
Power Word + Outrageous Results –
Public Enemy #1 (#2 & #3)
Perfect for your headline above your VSL as well as your Big
Promise, benefits, and more.
Example:
“3 Ways To Lose Weight Quickly And Easily Without Giving Up
Your Favorite Foods Or Spending Hours Doing Cardio!”

The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
Pain Then Pleasure Principle
Always reinforce your prospects pain and follow it with
your specific solu-on
Example:
“The greatest thing about our dry cleaning service is that
we’re reliable... which means you’ll never have to come
back and say, “My shirt is RUINED!”

-- 3 of 13 --

The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
The Triple Guarantee
When wording your guarantee, come up with
3 specific ways a customer can get their money back
Example:
“Here’s my 100% Iron Clad Triple Guarantee: If you don’t
see _______”…If you don’t feel/experience _____...or
even if you don’t like the font I used in the book!...
(guarantee specifics.)”

-- 4 of 13 --

The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
The Faux Price
STEP 1
Anchor a higher price to your product before
revealing your bonuses and the actual price
Example:
“______ is sold for (faux price; about 2-­‐3x higher), and for
good reason because it includes (specifics)… And before I
reveal your beSer deal today, let me cover all the
bonuses you’re about to receive…”

-- 5 of 13 --

The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
The Faux Price
STEP 2
Perform a price drop right before the actual price, and
one that includes the faux price plus bonus value
Example:
“Like I said earlier, (product) normally costs (faux price)… and if I were
to sell you all of the bonuses separately, the value would be over
(5-­‐10X actual price)…”
“Yet you’re not going to pay X, you’re not going to pay Y… you’re not
even going to pay Z!... In fact, by ordering today exclusively from this
video you’re not even going to pay our normal price of (faux price)...”

-- 6 of 13 --

The 3X VSL Toolbox
The “Tools” You Will Be Using Over
The Next Few Sessions To Complete
A Winning Video Sales LeCer
Product Pacing
Always assume the prospect has or is about to
purchased the product!
Example:
“When you purchase (product) today, you will want
to turn immediately to page 37 because you just
HAVE to see _____”

Pre-­‐QualificaVon
Kick the Zre-­‐kickers out of “The Club”!
Example:
“Before I tell you about the success others are seeing
with (product), let me first tell you who would never fit
as a (product) customer:”

Bad Wordsmithing:
“(Product) is really good if you want to make
money on the Internet…”
Be6er Wordsmithing:
“(Product) is ideal if you really want to make
money on the Internet…”
Supreme Wordsmithing:
“(Product) is ideally posiVoned to empower you make a truck
load of cash on the Internet…and do it faster than ever…”

Subliminal HighlighVng
Specific words highlighted in red in your VSL
Making specific words highlighted prompts the readers’
subconscious mind (consciously, few readers will nogce)
Pull out specific words that appeal to your
prospects’ greatest desires
Examples:
Easy, Fun, Simple, Superior, Proven, Only, Yes, Buy, Now

One Sentence Forma[ng
